{{CargoOrgan
|name=Rainbow Islet
|type=Common
|rank=red
|id=10947
|idx=141
|description=Cotton candy-like cell cluster made of pink beta cells and blue alpha cells. Surface has candy coating sheen. Glows rainbow aura when blood sugar is stable.
|skill=
|hp=2930
|def=284
|atk=244
|rush=249
|gene1=Per Altar God Descent, {race} RUSH +7
Gods Descended: 30/30
|gene2=Fire DMG +2%
|gene3=Wind DMG +2%
|gene4={race} Leadership +5
|gene5=Water DMG +2%
|gene6=Earth DMG +2%
|gene7={race} Leadership +10 (Awakened)
|}}
